component.name: SupabaseTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "run" end sub
function headers(cfg as object) as object return { "apikey": cfg.supabaseKey, "Authorization": "Bearer " + cfg.supabaseKey, "Content-Type": "application/json", "Prefer": "return=representation" } end function
' Petición HTTP genérica. Devuelve { ok, code, json } function httpRequest(method as string, url as string, body as string, hdrs as object) as object port = CreateObject("roMessagePort") xfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") xfer.setMessagePort(port) xfer.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") xfer.initClientCertificates() xfer.setUrl(url) for each k in hdrs xfer.addHeader(k, hdrs[k]) end for xfer.retainBodyOnError(true)
started = false if method = "GET" then started = xfer.asyncGetToString() else if method = "POST" then xfer.setRequest("POST") started = xfer.asyncPostFromString(body) else if method = "PATCH" then xfer.setRequest("PATCH") started = xfer.asyncPostFromString(body) end if
result = { ok: false, code: 0, json: invalid, raw: "" } if not started then return result
ev = wait(15000, port) ' timeout 15s if type(ev) = "roUrlEvent" then result.code = ev.getResponseCode() result.raw = ev.getString() result.ok = (result.code >= 200 and result.code < 300) if result.raw <> invalid and Len(result.raw) > 0 then parsed = ParseJson(result.raw) if parsed <> invalid then result.json = parsed end if end if return result end function
sub run() cfg = GQConfig() op = m.top.op p = m.top.params if p = invalid then p = {} hdrs = headers(cfg) base = cfg.supabaseUrl + "/rest/v1/" out = { op: op, ok: false }
if op = "createRoom" then url = base + "rooms" body = FormatJson({ code: p.code, status: "lobby", settings: p.settings }) r = httpRequest("POST", url, body, hdrs) out.ok = r.ok if r.ok and r.json <> invalid and r.json.Count() > 0 then out.room = r.json[0]
else if op = "getRoom" then url = base + "rooms?id=eq." + p.id + "&select=*" r = httpRequest("GET", url, "", hdrs) out.ok = r.ok if r.ok and r.json <> invalid and r.json.Count() > 0 then out.room = r.json[0]
else if op = "getPlayers" then url = base + "players?room_id=eq." + p.roomId + "&select=*&order=score.desc" r = httpRequest("GET", url, "", hdrs) out.ok = r.ok if r.ok then out.players = r.json
else if op = "updateRoom" then url = base + "rooms?id=eq." + p.id body = FormatJson(p.patch) r = httpRequest("PATCH", url, body, hdrs) out.ok = r.ok if r.ok and r.json <> invalid and r.json.Count() > 0 then out.room = r.json[0] end if
m.top.result = out m.top.done = true end sub
